plugin.name: switcher
plugin._long: A plugin to change active window with a thumbnail grid animation.

option.name: next_view
option._long: Switches to the next view with the specified key.

option.name: prev_view
option._long: Switches to the previous view with the specified key.

option.name: speed
option._long: Sets the duration of the animation in milliseconds.

option.name: view_thumbnail_width
option._long: Sets the thumbnail width in pixels. Height is calculated automatically to maintain aspect ratio.

option.name: grid_width_percent
option._long: Sets the total grid width as percentage of screen width (e.g., 90 for 90%).
